URL Source: https://www.cnn.com/markets/

Markdown Content:

# Markets

Up-to-date stock market data coverage from CNN. Get the latest updates on US markets, world markets, stock quotes, crypto, commodities and currencies.

[](https://www.cnn.com/business/markets/fear-and-greed/index.html)

[----- is driving the US market](https://www.cnn.com/markets/fear-and-greed)

*   ![Image 2: CNN Business Nightcap](https://media.cnn.com/api/v1/images/stellar/prod/20221006-nightcap-large-169.png?q=h_560,w_1578,x_0,y_0) #### CNN Business Nightcap

We read every day so you don't have to. Sign up for CNN Business' nightly newsletter for the top stories you need to know.

[## Business Briefing Show all](https://www.cnn.com/business/investing)

*   [![Image 3: Share your perspective and experience about how years of uncomfortably high inflation have affected your household finances.](https://media.cnn.com/api/v1/images/stellar/prod/ap26093029713700.jpg?c=16x9&q=h_438,w_780,c_fill) Nam Y. Huh/AP](https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/11/economy/us-inflation-affordability-callout)[Tell us: How much inflation can your budget take?](https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/11/economy/us-inflation-affordability-callout)
*   [![Image 4: Prices were expected to rise in the coming months due to the ripple effects of the US-Israeli war with Iran.](https://media.cnn.com/api/v1/images/stellar/prod/gettyimages-2265282331-1.jpg?c=16x9&q=h_144,w_256,c_fill) David L. Ryan/The Boston Globe/Getty Images](https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/10/economy/us-cpi-inflation-march)[Iran war oil shock pushes US inflation to 3.3%. It’s expected to get worse](https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/10/economy/us-cpi-inflation-march)
*   [![Image 5: Shoppers carry bags in the Union Square neighborhood of San Francisco, California, US, on Wednesday, Jan. 21, 2026.](https://media.cnn.com/api/v1/images/stellar/prod/gettyimages-2256908645.jpg?c=16x9&q=h_144,w_256,c_fill) David Paul Morris/Bloomberg/Getty Images](https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/10/economy/us-consumer-sentiment-record-low-april)[Consumer sentiment plummets to record low as Iran war jacks up inflation](https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/10/economy/us-consumer-sentiment-record-low-april)
*   [![Image 6: United Airlines has raised the price of checked luggage and has warned that 5% of routes could be cut over the next two quarters as a result of the war with Iran that's pushed fuel prices significantly higher.](https://media.cnn.com/api/v1/images/stellar/prod/gettyimages-2266699831.jpg?c=16x9&q=h_144,w_256,c_fill) Kena Betancur/AFP/Getty Images](https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/07/economy/fuel-surcharge-fees-added-oil)[Beyond gas: The price increases American consumers are experiencing from the Iran war](https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/07/economy/fuel-surcharge-fees-added-oil)
*   [![Image 7: Treasury yields have moved higher since the war with Iran began, raising the cost of a mortgage.](https://media.cnn.com/api/v1/images/stellar/prod/gettyimages-2270295947.jpg?c=16x9&q=h_144,w_256,c_fill) Mario Tama/Getty Images](https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/09/economy/iran-war-bonds-mortgages-loans)[The Iran war is making life more expensive for Americans](https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/09/economy/iran-war-bonds-mortgages-loans)
*   [![Image 8: Gas prices over five dollars a gallon are displayed at an Exxon gas station near the U.S. Capitol Building on March 31, 2026 in Washington, DC. The national average of one gallon of gas has risen to roughly $4.02 amid the ongoing war with Iran.](https://media.cnn.com/api/v1/images/stellar/prod/gettyimages-2268673265.jpg?c=16x9&q=h_144,w_256,c_fill) Andrew Harnik/Getty Images](https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/09/economy/us-cpi-inflation-march-preview-war-wages)[Wage gains have outpaced inflation for nearly three years. The war could quickly change that](https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/09/economy/us-cpi-inflation-march-preview-war-wages)
*   [![Image 9: A man shops for sandals at a Ross store on March 17 in Alhambra, California.](https://media.cnn.com/api/v1/images/stellar/prod/gettyimages-2267608521.jpg?c=16x9&q=h_144,w_256,c_fill) Jason Armond/Los Angeles Times/Getty Images](https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/09/economy/us-pce-consumer-spending-inflation-february)[Inflation stayed stubbornly high heading into the Iran war, Fed’s preferred gauge shows](https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/09/economy/us-pce-consumer-spending-inflation-february)

## Economic calendar

Mon · 4/13 Tue · 4/14 Wed · 4/15 Thu · 4/16 Fri · 4/17 

Time Event Impact Previous Forecast Actual 

Tuesday · Apr 14, 2026

6:00 AM ET

NFIB Small Business Optimism Index

Index

Low

98.8

97.5

--

8:30 AM ET

PPI-Final Demand

Ex-Food, Energy & Trade Services - M/M

PPI-FD Services - M/M change

Ex-Food & Energy - Y/Y
